# Gradle wrapper JAR is a binary file that cannot be created as text.
# To generate the Gradle wrapper files, run the following command from the project root:
#
#   gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.0
#
# This will generate:
#   - gradlew (Unix shell script)
#   - gradlew.bat (Windows batch script)
#   - gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar (binary JAR)
#   - gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties (already provided)
#
# Alternatively, if you have Gradle installed globally:
#   gradle wrapper
